productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Charcoal Shoes
description: Style NoteNeatly designed without fussy overlays, we love this Benetton shoe with its eye-for detail - the lace-ups match the upper and blend in beautifully with the rest of the upper. Patent leather overlays add a hint of vintage interest in this modern shoe. Who can put a price on style? Buy this before we run out of stock!Product DetailsBlunt toed, casual sneaker in charcoal grey with lace-up fasteningTextured synthetic leather upper with patent leather overlays and stitch details at the seams of the toe boxPadded collar and tongue (with branding) and an ergonomically shaped insoleUpper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with patterned groovesMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in sunlight
